title: LifeBound
description: A mod that allows players to form closer bonds with villagers beyond trading.
body:
Lifebound is a mod that allows players to form close bonds with villagers, create a family and get benefits from their loved ones. 

# Mod Overview
This mod adds these traits, items and events listed below.

## Items

### Heartthrob💓
Via 50% chance, player can gain a heartthrob every time they sleep.

### Bonding Extract🥛❤️
Bonding extract can be used to bond with villager. To bond, player can shift + right-click a villager, which will mark the villager as pregnant. After time count-down, player will have a child. Recipe of bonding extract: 2x Heartthrob + Milk Bucket

## Care Dynamic✨
When bonded with a villager, player becomes responsible of giving their partner care.

### Carepoints💖
To gain carepoints, player can give gifts to the villager. Heartthrob, flowers and food counts as gifts.

Bonded villager gives a food item every morning to the player. The quality of food depends on how high the caarepoints are. When carepoint is high, villager gives more fulfilling food, and when less, worse food or none at all.

## Interactions✉️
Player can now interact with villager through chat. (Note that this part is still beta and open to suggestions)

Supper?= Villager gives food.
Cuddles?= Villager emits heart particles/approaches player.
When player is away from home= Villager: Return home safe!

### Bond behaviour🔗
When bonded, the villager will try to return to the player's house (calculated with player's spawnpoint) If player bonds with a villager that is too far away from their home, the villager will try to run back to player's house. After bound, villager will stay close to player's house.
